testcase.name: test_cashflow_prediction_endpoint_returns_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration31_ai_analytics.py:53: in test_cashflow_prediction_endpoint_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 403: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
